ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., research, development, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., solid, liquid, gas) */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment is part of */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., temperature sweep, time-dependent) */,
  "experimental_conditions" TEXT /* Experimental conditions (e.g., temperature range, pressure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data point belongs to */,
  "fraction_frozen" REAL /* Fraction of the material that is frozen */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the measurement was taken */,
  "k_value" REAL /* Thermal conductivity value (k) */,
  "k_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the thermal conductivity value (k) */,
  "k_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the thermal conductivity value (k) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., W/mK, W/m°C) */,
  "measurement_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the measurement (e.g., ±0.01 W/mK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the member is part of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the member to the project (e.g., experiment design, data analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data (e.g., research, analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "readme_text" TEXT /* Text of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the note is related to */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was made */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or observation */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., observation, issue, conclusion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the publication is related to */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was released */,
  "publication_link" TEXT /* Link to the publication (e.g., DOI) */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of the publication (e.g., journal article, conference paper) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the grant is related to */,
  "grant_name" TEXT /* Name of the grant */,
  "grant_amount" REAL /* Amount of the grant in USD */,
  "grant_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the grant */,
  "grant_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the grant */,
  "grant_agency" TEXT /* Agency providing the grant */,
  "grant_status" TEXT /* Status of the grant (e.g., active, pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_grants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version (e.g., initial upload, updated values) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "import_description" TEXT /* Description of the import (e.g., initial import, updated values) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)
